title: cynanchum ethiopicum subsp. angolense
intro: Cynanchum ethiopicum subsp. angolense, also known as the Angola swallowwort, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is a climbing plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and glycosides, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, providing health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and antiseptic effects. Cynanchum ethiopicum subsp. angolense can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
